name: Cocoa Kiss Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together the butter, sugar, and vanilla until creamy.
2. Stir together the flour and cocoa in a separate bowl.
3. Add the butter mixture to the dry ingredients, beating until blended.
4. Mix in the chopped pecans until well combined.
5. Refrigerate the dough for about 1 hour, or until firm enough to handle.
6. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit (190 degrees Celsius).
7. Remove wrappers from the chocolate pieces.
8. Shape a small amount of dough around each chocolate piece, covering it completely.
9. Form the shaped pieces into balls and place them on an ungreased cookie sheet.
10. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until set.
11. Allow cookies to cool slightly, about 1 minute, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
12. Roll each cooled cookie in powdered sugar. Roll again in sugar before serving, if desired.
13. Makes approximately 4-1/2 dozen cookies.
